selections.name: Price Tag
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Group and Listed company to a provincial maiden. Has been racing against elite 2YOs and is a clear standout here.

selections.name: Posh Diamante
selections.reason: Placed on a soft track on debut and drawn well. Looks the logical danger if the favorite underperforms.

selections.name: Salaria
selections.reason: Fitter second-up after a solid third last start. Handles the soft going.

selections.name: Spirit Of Omaha
selections.reason: Debutant who won a recent jump-out. Capable of featuring in the placings.

selections.name: Logam
selections.reason: Excellent debut run when narrowly beaten. Drawn perfectly in barrier 3 and should be fitter for the experience.

selections.name: Theatrical Queen
selections.reason: Consistent filly who has placed in both career starts and handles soft conditions well.

selections.name: Peiriant
selections.reason: Made good ground for second on debut at long odds. Drawn well to get a soft run.

selections.name: Jack The Judge
selections.reason: Placed on a soft track on debut and gets the inside barrier advantage here.

danger_horse.name: Theatrical Queen
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent and proven on wet tracks, making her a legitimate threat to the top pick.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #3. Exacta Box 3,10. Trifecta Box 2,3,4,10.

selections.name: Iftihar
selections.reason: Extremely consistent filly who has placed in all three starts. Handles the soft going and is knocking on the door for a win.

selections.name: Playful As
selections.reason: Showed marked improvement to finish third last start. Drawn well and handles the wet conditions.

selections.name: Bella Verona
selections.reason: Debutant from the strong Matt Laurie stable. Won a recent jump-out and commands respect.

selections.name: Foxsky
selections.reason: Showed good early pace to place last start. Can give a sight if allowed to dictate.

danger_horse.name: Bella Verona
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed profile from a top stable; could easily be better than these exposed maidens.

selections.name: Temu Tilly
selections.reason: Excellent second last start over 7.5f on a soft track. Looks ready for the mile and maps well.

selections.name: Easy Red
selections.reason: Has placed in both career starts and draws perfectly in barrier 2 to get an economical run.

selections.name: Parera
selections.reason: Improved nicely second-up to grab a placing. Drawn the pole and should be peaking third-up.

selections.name: Olympia Fields
selections.reason: Set the pace and boxed on well for third last start. Drawn well and handles the wet.

danger_horse.name: Easy Red
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and a perfect draw make him a major player in this field.
